commit.message:
feat: replace N2YO with CelesTrak + SGP4 real-time satellite tracking

- New /api/tle endpoint fetches TLE data from CelesTrak with 4-hour cache
- satellite.js (SGP4) propagates exact positions client-side every frame
- AR tracker shows real-time satellite positions instead of 3-point interpolation
- Main page computes overhead + pass predictions client-side from TLEs
- Catalogs: visual, stations, debris (Cosmos 2251, Iridium 33), rocket bodies
- Shadow calculation determines if satellites are sunlit or in Earth's shadow
- No more API key dependency (CelesTrak is free, no key needed)

commit.message:
fix: async AI annotation to avoid CloudFront timeout (#322)

* fix: make AI annotation endpoint async to avoid CloudFront timeout

The AI annotation endpoint processes 60+ pages sequentially, exceeding
CloudFront's origin timeout. Returns 202 immediately and runs annotation
in the background. Added GET /ai-annotation-status endpoint for polling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: create AiAnnotationRun before 202 response to prevent race condition

Address CodeRabbit review: create the AiAnnotationRun record in the route
handler before returning 202, pass aiRunId to background job. Prevents
race where poller finds no record or a stale one. Also prevents duplicate
runs via ALREADY_RUNNING check. Status endpoint accepts aiRunId query param.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: improve company name extraction for rating badge matching

- Rewrite extractRatings with two-phase approach:
  1. Parse summary section (【総合優先順位】) for bulk company→rating map
  2. Fall back to individual section search for unmatched files
- New extractSearchNames handles multiple filename patterns:
  求人票_会社名_日付, 数字_会社名, 会社名_Noxxxxxx, etc.
- normalizeCompanyName strips 法人格, converts 全角→半角, removes spaces
  for fuzzy matching (handles ＯＩＣ→OIC, レオパレス２１→レオパレス21)
- Summary matching uses bidirectional includes + normalized comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add closest-type estimation with differential diagnosis

When SCCmec type cannot be definitively assigned (Unknown, Partial,
Composite), estimates the most likely type(s) using weighted component
matching with sub-threshold hit evidence.

Key changes:
- parser.py and coverage.py return (hits, soft_hits) tuples, retaining
  sub-threshold alignments (>=70% identity, >=50% coverage) as soft evidence
- New lib/estimator.py: scores all 15 types against detected + sub-threshold
  genes using biologically-weighted importance (mec=1.0, ccr=0.8, regulatory=0.5,
  IS=0.3), ranks top 3 candidates with differential diagnosis rulings
- confidence.py calls estimator for non-Positive results, adds estimation
  block to JSON output
- TSV gets Estimated_Type and Estimation_Score columns
- HTML report shows estimation card with candidate table
- README updated with Staphit/Staphit2 integration examples

7 new estimator tests, 65 total passing.

- GET /api/auth/session, POST /api/auth/logout

fix: gate auto-simulate on workerReady to eliminate race condition

The auto-simulate effect fired when terrainReady became true, but the
worker might not have finished processing terrain yet. runSimulation
silently failed because terrainSentRef was still false. Now the effect
waits for workerReady, eliminating the 150ms timeout race condition.

v8: Clean SaaS dashboard - gradient food thumbnails, fixed waitlist logic

Space Grotesk font, blue accent, proper capacity logic (waitlist only shown when 50/50 full). Food items shown as CSS gradient thumbnails instead of emojis with category labels. Only SkyTeam JFK is full with 12-person waitlist and ~25 min wait. Other lounges show walk-in access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Decode Inshore speed, penalty timer, race progress from Colyseus state

Deep analysis of captured data revealed:
- Field 14 = BOAT SPEED (correlates with position delta, ~10000=full speed)
- Field 10 = MANEUVER PENALTY (spikes on sharp turns, decays to ~150-200)
- Field 15 = RACE PROGRESS (ramps 0→200 over race duration)
- Field 16 = DISTANCE SAILED accumulator (ramps 0→65535)

Updated state-decoder field mapping, inshore-pipeline normalizer now
includes speed, penaltyTimer, raceProgress, distanceSailed per boat.
263 tests passing.

commit.message:
feat: persistent storage, review queue, all routes functional

File-based persistence (PersistentMap):
- All data now survives server restarts (JSON files in backend/data/)
- Debounced writes (500ms batching)
- Auto-creates data directory on startup
- Songs, artists, events, tickets, stakes, nicknames all persistent

Content moderation:
- POST /api/moderation/flag — community flagging (3 flags = review queue)
- GET /api/moderation/queue — review queue for trusted users (score 80+)
- POST /api/moderation/review — approve/remove/escalate flagged content
- GET /api/moderation/trust/:wallet — trust score lookup
- Trust levels: new (0-49), member (50-69), established (70-89), trusted (90+)

All in-memory Maps replaced with PersistentMap:
- songs.ts, artist.ts, tickets.ts, staking.ts, nicknames.ts
- Data files: songs.json, artists.json, events.json, tickets.json, staking-pools.json, stakes.json, nicknames.json

Manual rotation buttons (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°) and rotateSelected now
swap w/h when crossing the 90/270 boundary, matching the nesting
convention. Position (x,y) adjusted to keep the item centered.
This ensures drawImage un-swap (dw/dh) produces correct proportions
for both manually rotated and nesting-rotated items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Miniflare の poisoned stub エラーを修正

bun:test ではモジュールレベルの afterAll がファイル間で共有されるため、
先に完了したテストファイルの afterAll が dispose() を呼ぶと
後続ファイルで "poisoned stub" エラーが発生していた（flaky テスト）。

テストプロセス終了時に Miniflare は自動クリーンアップされるため、
dispose() の明示的な呼び出しを削除して解決。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复采购单价小数位检查永不触发的bug

原判断 Math.abs(pn*10000 - Math.round(pn*10000)) > 0.5 在数学上永远不成立，
导致超过4位小数的采购单价（如0.441860465116279）不会被标红。
改为复用字符串方式的 ck_checkDecimal，并支持自定义最大小数位数。

docs: CLEF whitepaper v1.0 — tokenomics, architecture, roadmap

Complete whitepaper covering:
- Problem statement (broken royalties, ticket scalping, no discovery incentive)
- Solution: transparent royalties, anti-scalp tickets, listener staking
- $CLEF token specs: 1B supply, 9 decimals, SPL token on Solana
- Distribution: 40% community, 20% team (4yr vest), 20% treasury, 10% liquidity, 10% early artists
- Revenue model: 5% pool fee, 2.5% staking fee, 0.5% ticket fee, 2.5% NFT fee
- Architecture: 4 Solana programs + backend + IPFS + scanner + mobile app
- Trust & safety: fingerprinting, flagging, rate limits, verification
- 4-phase roadmap: Foundation → Launch → Growth → Scale
- Legal disclaimer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix existing placement stamping: un-swap w/h before building mask

When nesting swaps w/h for rotated items (footprint convention),
buildItemMask was receiving swapped dimensions AND applying rotation,
causing double-rotation. Now un-swaps before calling buildItemMask
so the mask correctly represents the existing item's occupied area.

commit.message:
feat: css-variants を導入し、Alert・Chip コンポーネントを追加

cva (class-variance-authority) から css-variants に移行。
主な変更点:
- cva() → cv(): base が第1引数からプロパティに統合
- VariantProps → Parameters<typeof fn>[0]: 型ユーティリティ不要に
- import が2行→1行に簡素化

css-variants 固有の機能を活用した新規コンポーネント:
- Alert: scv() (Slot Class Variants) で5スロット（root/icon/title/description/close）
  のスタイルを severity バリアントで一括制御
- Chip: compoundVariants で variant(filled/outlined) × color(5色) の
  組み合わせスタイルを宣言的に定義

cva では scv() に相当する機能がなく、マルチ要素コンポーネントでは
スロットごとに個別の cva() を定義するか手動で条件分岐する必要があった。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: move Dockerfile to repo root so build context paths resolve correctly

dashbord_snkrdunk/Dockerfile caused Railway to use that subdir as context,
making COPY dashbord_snkrdunk/ fail. Dockerfile at root uses repo root as
context, so all COPY paths work correctly.

spinner while loading and italic placeholder while text is empty.

Add generateBriefing() and generateLookahead() to AppState

Falls back to previewBriefing/previewLookahead until authenticated.
briefingPrompt/lookaheadPrompt are pure functions for testability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use legacy download session instead of cloning primary (da-gfs)

Cloning the primary Telethon session file copies MTProto auth keys and
message sequence counters, causing encryption state conflicts with
Telegram's servers ("Too many messages had to be ignored consecutively").
This resulted in 100% download failure rate since da-s2i merge.

Fix: fall back to the pre-existing darkdisco_monitor_download.session
for DOWNLOAD_1 role, and let Telethon create fresh sessions for other
roles rather than copying the primary. Remove shutil import.

and active goal concurrently. Builds live AthleteContext via the new
factory method and replaces preview data on AppState.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix rotation: store original w/h, adjust position for correct footprint

Instead of swapping w/h in nesting results (which broke rendering),
keep original dimensions and adjust x/y so the center matches the
rotated footprint. This means:
- drawImage always uses original proportions (no un-swap needed)
- Selection box matches image exactly
- rotBounds correctly computes the axis-aligned bounding box
- Manual rotation and nesting rotation use the same convention

Add AthleteContext.build() factory and AthleteContextTests

AthleteContext.build(name:snapshots:goalRow:lastActivityDate:) assembles
live context from Supabase data — current/peak fitness from snapshots,
goal from GoalRow, yearsActive from history span, totalActivities summed,
daysSinceLastRide from lastActivityDate. contextPayload gains recent_weeks
key (empty array, populated in Step 10). 13 passing tests.
